What We Do

One agency.
One focus.

We don't do restaurants, gyms or e-commerce. Every strategy, creative and system is built for real estate.

◈

Meta Ads Management

Full campaign strategy, creative production, audience targeting, budget management and daily monitoring — end to end.

Core
◇

AI Lead Pre-Screening

Every lead is automatically screened before it reaches you — so your time goes only to buyers and sellers who are ready.

Exclusive
◈

Instant AI Follow-Up

Our system contacts new leads within minutes of submission — dramatically increasing conversion before they go cold.

Exclusive
△

Buyer Lead Generation

Targeted campaigns for new developments, listings and off-plan properties. Reach qualified buyers in your area at scale.

△

Seller Lead Generation

Attract homeowners ready to list — through proven offers including the Honest Home Review and Suburb Price Report.

◇

Performance Reporting

Weekly reports covering leads generated, cost per lead, reach and total spend — fully transparent, no fluff.

How It Works

Live in 7 days.

From first call to first lead in under a week. No lengthy onboarding, no delays.

1

Discovery Call

We understand your market, target audience and define the offer in 30 minutes.

2

Creative Build

We design your ad creatives and set up the lead form and campaign structure.

3

Campaign Launch

Your ads go live on Facebook and Instagram, targeting your exact audience.

4

Leads Delivered

Qualified leads reach you pre-screened and followed up automatically within minutes.

Proven Results

Numbers that speak.

Real campaigns, real leads, real agents growing their business across South Africa.

Chelseas Estate — Rynfield, Benoni
25+
Leads in the first 5-day campaign
Test campaign run at R300/day across Facebook and Instagram for a new development in Rynfield. Generated over 25 qualified buyer leads with a cost per lead well under the R150 benchmark — results that converted immediately into a full monthly retainer.
Cost Per Lead
R18–35
Average CPL across campaigns
Consistently delivering leads at a fraction of what agents typically pay through property portals.
Seller Campaign — Bedfordview/Germiston
R8M
Estimated property value from a single lead
One targeted seller campaign produced a lead with a property valued at approximately R8 million.
Day 1 Performance
6
Leads on day one of new retainer
New campaign delivered 6 leads on the first day at ~R24 CPL — well below the R150 benchmark.
